task_completion.description: The sales_report.xlsx file is opened in Microsoft Excel 2010.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Microsoft Excel window is visible with 'sales_report.xlsx' in the title bar and the retail sales data displayed.

task_completion.description: The Conditional Formatting tool is accessed for Column E.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Column E is selected and the 'Conditional Formatting' dropdown menu or 'Conditional Formatting Rules Manager' dialog is open.

task_completion.description: A conditional formatting rule is applied to make cells with values greater than 10000 have a green fill.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A rule for 'Cell Value > 10000' with green fill is visible in the Rules Manager, OR cells in Column E with values > 10000 (most cells) are shown with a green background color in the spreadsheet.

task_completion.description: A conditional formatting rule is applied to make cells with values less than 5000 have a red fill.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A rule for 'Cell Value < 5000' with red fill is visible in the Rules Manager, OR the cell in Column E with a value < 5000 (specifically the value 2733) is shown with a red background color in the spreadsheet.

task_completion.description: The changes are saved to the file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Save icon (floppy disk) in the top-left Quick Access Toolbar is clicked, or the File > Save menu option is used.

integrity.description: The agent used the Microsoft Excel GUI to apply the formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Excel 2010 ribbon and dialog boxes, not a terminal or Python script modifying the file.

integrity.description: The formatting is applied to the original dataset.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data in the spreadsheet matches the expected retail sales data (e.g., Column A has months starting from 2018, Column E has revenue values in the thousands/tens of thousands).

integrity.description: The agent used Conditional Formatting rather than manually coloring individual cells.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Conditional Formatting dialogs are used. The standard 'Fill Color' bucket tool is not manually applied to specific cells.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The file sales_report.xlsx contains 96 rows (1 header + 95 data rows). Column E is 'Revenue'. There are 93 cells in Column E with values greater than 10,000 (which should be formatted green) and exactly 1 cell with a value less than 5,000 (value: 2733, which should be formatted red). The data spans from 2018-01 to 2025-11.
